content: How about the polymarket prediction for the bitcoin price?

args.thought: User wants specific Polymarket prediction data for Bitcoin price. I already referenced some Polymarket probabilities in my previous response ($65K touch 51.2%, $60K breach 6.6%), but they want a deeper dive into what prediction markets are actually pricing in. I need to search Polymarket for Bitcoin-related markets to get current crowd-implied probabilities on price levels, direction, and key events.

data.result:
Polymarket — prediction market probabilities for: "Bitcoin price"
(Prices reflect crowd-sourced odds from real-money traders)

▸ Will Bitcoin dip to $60,000 in March?
    Yes: 6.5%
    No: 93.5%
    expires 2026-04-01 · 24h vol $537K · liquidity $101K

▸ Will Bitcoin reach $80,000 in March?
    Yes: 0.4%
    No: 99.7%
    expires 2026-04-01 · 24h vol $436K · liquidity $405K

▸ Will Bitcoin dip to $65,000 in March?
    Yes: 50.7%
    No: 49.3%
    expires 2026-04-01 · 24h vol $305K · liquidity $79K

Source: polymarket.com — probabilities are market-implied, not guaranteed.
